content.text:
*quiet for a moment*

I don't know. Feeling it, I guess. Whatever "it" is. 

I haven't really... I mean, I've been busy. There was the estate to deal with, her house, my brother and sister couldn't be bothered to show up for most of it so I handled it. There's still stuff to sort out actually. Paperwork. 

*slight shrug in tone*

The grief thing, I don't know. It hasn't really... hit. Or maybe it has and I just keep turning it off before it gets going. That's kind of why I'm here. I feel like I should be feeling something more than I am. Or differently. I don't know what I'm supposed to be doing with it.
